name: TC-06: Protected Route Accessed When Authenticated
description: Accessing the master products page works normally when authenticated.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Master Produk sidebar navigation item
Verify the main content updates to show the Master Produk section
Verify the page header displays the title MASTER PRODUK
